overlap.WS48.r2.note: WS/48 overlap R²: share of its variance the other systems (kin excluded) can reconstruct

panel.BPM.describe_mean.note: BPM mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.BPM.forecast_mean.note: BPM mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.DBPM.describe_mean.note: DBPM mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.DBPM.forecast_mean.note: DBPM mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.GAME_SCORE.describe_mean.note: Game Score mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.GAME_SCORE.forecast_mean.note: Game Score mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.OBPM.describe_mean.note: OBPM mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.OBPM.forecast_mean.note: OBPM mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.PER.describe_mean.note: PER mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.PER.describe_median_pct.note: PER median same-season (describe) R² across the panel, percent (append % in prose)

panel.PER.forecast_mean.note: PER mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.PER.forecast_median_pct.note: PER median next-season (forecast) CV R² across the panel, percent (append % in prose); median not mean because CV R² blow-up pairs make the mean unquotable

panel.VORP.describe_mean.note: VORP mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.VORP.forecast_mean.note: VORP mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.WS.describe_mean.note: Win Shares mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.WS48.describe_mean.note: WS/48 mean same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.WS48.forecast_mean.note: WS/48 mean next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.bpm_beats_per_pairs.note: season-pairs where BPM forecasts better than PER

panel.describe_top.name.note: system with the best average same-season (describe) R² across the panel

panel.first_season.note: first season in the pooled panel

panel.forecast_top.mean_pct.note: best forecaster's mean forecast R² across the panel, percent (append % in prose)

panel.forecast_top.name.note: system with the best average next-season (forecast) R² across the panel

panel.last_season.note: last season in the pooled panel

panel.n_cmp_pairs.note: season-pairs with both BPM and PER forecast scores

playoff.bootstrap_b.note: game-level bootstrap re-draws behind the shift range

playoff.consensus1.ci_hi.note: regular-season consensus #1 player's shift range high

playoff.consensus1.ci_lo.note: regular-season consensus #1 player's shift range low

playoff.consensus1.z.note: regular-season consensus #1 player's shrunk playoff shift

playoff.faller.1.ci_hi.note: playoff faller rank 1 shift range high (bootstrap)

playoff.faller.1.ci_lo.note: playoff faller rank 1 shift range low (bootstrap)

playoff.faller.1.z.note: playoff faller rank 1 shrunk composite shift

playoff.faller.2.ci_hi.note: playoff faller rank 2 shift range high (bootstrap)

playoff.faller.2.ci_lo.note: playoff faller rank 2 shift range low (bootstrap)

playoff.faller.2.z.note: playoff faller rank 2 shrunk composite shift

playoff.faller.3.ci_lo.note: playoff faller rank 3 shift range low (bootstrap)

playoff.faller.3.z.note: playoff faller rank 3 shrunk composite shift

playoff.min_floor.note: minimum playoff minutes to enter the riser/faller pool

playoff.n_clear.note: qualified players whose shift range excludes zero

playoff.riser.1.ci_hi.note: playoff riser rank 1 shift range high (bootstrap)

playoff.riser.1.ci_lo.note: playoff riser rank 1 shift range low (bootstrap)

playoff.riser.1.z.note: playoff riser rank 1 shrunk composite shift

playoff.riser.2.ci_hi.note: playoff riser rank 2 shift range high (bootstrap)

playoff.riser.2.ci_lo.note: playoff riser rank 2 shift range low (bootstrap)

playoff.riser.3.ci_hi.note: playoff riser rank 3 shift range high (bootstrap)

playoff.riser.3.ci_lo.note: playoff riser rank 3 shift range low (bootstrap)

playoff.riser.3.z.note: playoff riser rank 3 shrunk composite shift

playoff.shrink_minutes.note: playoff minutes at which the composite shift keeps half its size

powerlaw.GAME_SCORE.r2.note: Game Score log-log power-law fit R^2

powerlaw.WS.r2.note: Win Shares log-log power-law fit R^2

powerlaw.n_systems.note: systems whose value-vs-rank curve fits a power law

powerlaw.non_systems.note: names of systems whose value-vs-rank curve bends (not a power law)

powerlaw.systems.display: Game Score, PER, Win Shares, BPM, OBPM, DBPM, VORP, RAPM, O-RAPM, D-RAPM, RAPM+prior, O-RAPM+prior
powerlaw.systems.note: names of systems whose value-vs-rank curve fits a power law
powerlaw.systems.value: Game Score, PER, Win Shares, BPM, OBPM, DBPM, VORP, RAPM, O-RAPM, D-RAPM, RAPM+prior, O-RAPM+prior

pwv.brunson_rank_k1.note: Brunson PWV rank with playoff weight 1x (of 103)

pwv.brunson_rank_k2.note: Brunson PWV rank with playoff weight 2x (of 103)

pwv.brunson_rank_k3.note: Brunson PWV rank with playoff weight 3x (of 103)

pwv.pool_n.note: players in the playoff pool (>= 150 playoff min)

rapm.box_corr_mean.note: mean abs rank corr of single-season RAPM with box-score systems

rapm.consensus_corr.note: bare single-season RAPM rank agreement with the consensus

rapm.top1_consensus_rank.note: consensus rank of the single-season RAPM #1 player

rapm_my.box_corr_mean.note: mean abs rank corr of RAPM_MY with box-score systems

rapm_my.consensus_corr.note: RAPM_MY rank agreement with the consensus rating

rapm_rel.min_minutes.note: minutes floor for the RAPM reliability read

rapm_rel.splithalf.note: split-half reliability of bare RAPM (1000+ min)

rapm_rel.yoy_rapm.note: year-over-year stability of bare RAPM (1000+ min)

rapm_shape.frac_neg.note: pooled RAPM share of qualified player-seasons below zero (percent)

rapm_shape.n.note: qualified player-seasons in the pooled RAPM distribution

rapm_shape.n_seasons.note: play-by-play seasons pooled for the RAPM distribution shape

retro.GAME_SCORE.r2.note: Game Score team point-diff retrodiction R² (in-sample)

retro.WS.r2.note: Win Shares team point-diff retrodiction R² (in-sample)

retro.mechanical.cv_r2.note: the mechanically-top rating's retrodiction R² (≈1.0 by construction)

retro.mechanical.name.note: rating that tops retrodiction mechanically (team-anchored box metric)

retro.top.cv_r2.note: top outcome-blind rating's leave-one-team-out retrodiction R²

retro.top.cv_r2_pct.note: top outcome-blind rating's retrodiction R² as a percent (append %)

retro.top.name.note: top outcome-blind retrodictor of team point differential (CV)

stability.BPM.retention_pct.note: BPM top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.DBPM.corr.note: DBPM year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.DBPM.retention_pct.note: DBPM top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.GAME_SCORE.corr.note: Game Score year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.GAME_SCORE.retention_pct.note: Game Score top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.OBPM.corr.note: OBPM year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.OBPM.retention_pct.note: OBPM top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.PER.corr.note: PER year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.PER.retention_pct.note: PER top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.VORP.corr.note: VORP year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.VORP.retention_pct.note: VORP top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.WS.corr.note: Win Shares year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.WS.retention_pct.note: Win Shares top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.WS48.corr.note: WS/48 year-over-year rating correlation (mean across pairs)

stability.WS48.retention_pct.note: WS/48 top-20 retention, percent (append % in prose)

stability.chance_pct.note: chance-level top-N retention (top-N / qualified pool), percent

stability.least_stable.name.note: system with the lowest year-over-year rating correlation

stability.most_stable.name.note: system with the highest year-over-year rating correlation

stability.n_pairs.note: consecutive season-pairs in the stability panel

stability.top_n.note: elite-tier size for the year-over-year retention measure

stability.top_retention.name.note: system that best keeps the same names in its top tier year to year
